title: S3 Object Lambda
description: Architect real-time data transformation solutions using S3 Object Lambda. Implement on-the-fly modifications to S3 objects, such as PII masking or image resizing, during the GetObject request.
objectives: Architect real-time data transformation solutions using S3 Object Lambda.
Implement on-the-fly modifications to S3 objects, such as PII masking or image resizing, during the GetObject request.
